testing_centers.notes: In-person test centers and online proctored via OnVUE

id_requirements: Government-issued photo ID required. Name on ID must match registration exactly.
exam_rules: No personal items, notes, or reference materials permitted. Online proctored (OnVUE): must be alone in room, no second monitors, no virtual machines or remote desktop. SPLK-1002 prereq: Core Certified User recommended. SPLK-1004 prereq: Enterprise Certified Admin recommended.
renewal_options: Recertify by passing the current version of the exam before expiry.

retake_policy.notes: 30-day waiting period between failed attempts. No limit on total attempts.
